016package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller;
017
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.IssueReportStatusUpdateRequest;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.IssueReportSummary;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.IssueReportTypesUpdateRequest;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.ManagerIssueReportResponse;
022import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueReport;
023import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.IssueReportService;
024import java.util.UUID;
025import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
026import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
027import org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;
028import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort;
029import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort.Direction;
030import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
031import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
032import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
033import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
034import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
035import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
036import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
037import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;
038import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
039
040/**
041 * REST controller for manager-only issue report administration operations.
042 */
043@RestController
044@RequestMapping("/manager/issue-reports")
045public class ManagerIssueReportController {
046
047  private static final int DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 20;
048  private static final int DEFAULT_PAGE_NUMBER = 0;
049
050  private final IssueReportService service;
051
052  /**
053   * Creates a controller exposing manager-only issue report administration operations.
054   *
055   * @param service issue report service.
056   */
057  @Autowired
058  public ManagerIssueReportController(IssueReportService service) {
059    this.service = service;
060  }
061
062  /**
063   * Returns a page of issue report summaries.
064   *
065   * @param pageSize page size.
066   * @param pageNumber zero-based page index.
067   * @return page of report summaries.
068   */
069  @GetMapping(produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
070  @Transactional(readOnly = true)
071  public Page<IssueReportSummary> getAll(
072      @RequestParam(defaultValue = "" + DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE) int pageSize,
073      @RequestParam(defaultValue = "" + DEFAULT_PAGE_NUMBER) int pageNumber
074  ) {
075    PageRequest pageable = PageRequest.of(
076        pageNumber,
077        pageSize,
078        Sort.by(Direction.DESC, "timeLastModified")
079    );
080    return service.getAll(pageable).map(IssueReportSummary::fromIssueReport);
081  }
082
083  /**
084   * Updates the accepted-state/status of an issue report.
085   *
086   * @param externalId report external ID.
087   * @param request request payload containing the new status tag.
088   * @return updated issue report.
089   */
090  @PutMapping(
091      value = "/{externalId}/status",
092      consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
093      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE
094  )
095  public IssueReport updateStatus(
096      @PathVariable UUID externalId,
097      @RequestBody IssueReportStatusUpdateRequest request
098  ) {
099    return service.setAcceptedState(externalId, request.getStatusTag());
100  }
101
102  /**
103   * Replaces the issue types associated with an issue report.
104   *
105   * @param externalId report external ID.
106   * @param request request payload containing the replacement issue type tags.
107   * @return updated issue report.
108   */
109  @PutMapping(
110      value = "/{externalId}/issue-types",
111      consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
112      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE
113  )
114  public IssueReport updateIssueTypes(
115      @PathVariable UUID externalId,
116      @RequestBody IssueReportTypesUpdateRequest request
117  ) {
118    return service.replaceIssueTypes(externalId, request.getIssueTypeTags());
119  }
120
121}
